recommendations.title: Love and Honor
recommendations.overview: When a young soldier in Vietnam gets dumped by his hometown girl, he and his best friend decide to go AWOL and return to the States to win her back.

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: The Choice
recommendations.overview: Travis and Gabby first meet as neighbors in a small coastal town and wind up in a relationship that is tested by life's most defining events.

recommendations.title: The Year My Parents Went on Vacation
recommendations.overview: A boy is left alone in a Jewish neighborhood in the year of 1970, where both world cup and dictatorship happen in Brazil.

recommendations.title: Bomb Scared
recommendations.overview: Somewhere in Spain, four ETA terrorists await a phone call before carrying out a mission, while the 2010 FIFA World Cup, where Spanish soccer team is one of the favorites to win, is being held in South Africa.

recommendations.title: The Fall Guy
recommendations.overview: Fresh off an almost career-ending accident, stuntman Colt Seavers has to track down a missing movie star, solve a conspiracy and try to win back the love of his life while still doing his day job.

recommendations.title: Becoming
recommendations.overview: Join former first lady Michelle Obama in an intimate documentary looking at her life, hopes and connection with others.

recommendations.title: When Fall Is Coming
recommendations.overview: Michelle is enjoying a peaceful retirement in a Burgundy village, close to her longtime friend Marie-Claude. When her Parisian daughter Valérie drops off her son Lucas to spend school vacation with his grandma, Michelle, stressed out by her daughter,

recommendations.title: M.S. Dhoni: The Untold Story
recommendations.overview: Based on the life story of Mahendra Singh Dhoni, and his journey to being the world cup winning captain of the Indian cricket team.
